function.description: Hash text with md5, sha1, sha224, sha256, sha384 or sha512 (hex digest) Returns: Lowercase hex digest, single line
function.name: crypto_hash

algo.description: Algorithm: md5 | sha1 | sha224 | sha256 | sha384 | sha512 (default: sha256)

function.description: HMAC signature of text with a secret key (md5, sha1, sha256, sha512) Returns: Lowercase hex signature, single line
function.name: crypto_hmac

algo.description: Algorithm: md5 | sha1 | sha256 | sha512 (default: sha256)

function.description: Generate cryptographically random token strings (configurable charset) Returns: One random token per line
function.name: crypto_token

count.description: Number of tokens to generate (one per line) (default: 1)

function.description: Hash a password with bcrypt (salted, cost-configurable) Returns: bcrypt hash string ($2b$...), single line
function.name: crypto_bcrypt_hash

function.description: Check a password against an existing bcrypt hash Returns: {"valid": true|false}; exit code 2 when false
function.name: crypto_bcrypt_verify

hash.description: Existing bcrypt hash to check against

function.description: Convert structured data between JSON, YAML and TOML Returns: The converted document in the target format
function.name: converter_data

function.description: Prettify or minify a JSON document (also validates it) Returns: The reformatted JSON document
function.name: converter_json_format

minify.description: Emit minified JSON instead of pretty-printed

function.description: Encode text to Base64 (--url-safe for the URL alphabet without padding) Returns: Base64 string, single line
function.name: converter_base64_encode

function.description: Decode Base64 to text (standard and URL-safe alphabets both accepted) Returns: The decoded text
function.name: converter_base64_decode

input.description: Input Base64 (reads stdin if omitted); standard and URL-safe alphabets accepted

function.description: Encode text to a lowercase hex string Returns: Hex string, single line
function.name: converter_hex_encode

function.description: Decode a hex string to text (0x prefix and whitespace tolerated) Returns: The decoded text
function.name: converter_hex_decode

function.description: Convert a string between naming cases (camel, pascal, snake, constant, kebab, train, title, dot, path, lower, upper) Returns: The re-cased string, single line
function.name: converter_case

to.description: Target case: camel | pascal | snake | constant | kebab | train | title | dot | path | lower | upper

function.description: Convert an integer between numeral bases 2-36 Returns: The number in the target base (lowercase digits), single line
function.name: converter_number_base

function.description: Convert a date-time (now, unix s/ms, RFC 3339, RFC 2822) into all common formats Returns: Object with unix, unix_ms, iso8601 (UTC), rfc2822 and local fields
function.name: converter_datetime

input.description: "now", unix seconds, unix milliseconds, or an RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 string (defaults to now)

function.description: Percent-encode text for safe use in a URL component Returns: Percent-encoded string, single line
function.name: web_url_encode

function.description: Decode a percent-encoded URL component Returns: The decoded text
function.name: web_url_decode

function.description: Parse a URL into scheme, host, port, path, query params, fragment and credentials Returns: Object with scheme, username, password, host, port, path, query, params (decoded key/value map) and fragment
function.name: web_url_parse

function.description: Decode a JWT's header and payload WITHOUT verifying the signature Returns: Object with header, payload, signature (raw base64url) and expired (true/false, or null when no exp claim)
function.name: web_jwt

function.description: Parse a user-agent string into browser, version, OS and device category Returns: Object with name, category (pc/smartphone/crawler/...), browser_type, version, os, os_version, vendor
function.name: web_user_agent

function.description: Escape text for safe embedding in HTML (quotes included) Returns: HTML-escaped text
function.name: web_html_escape

function.description: Decode HTML entities back to plain text Returns: The decoded text
function.name: web_html_unescape

function.description: Build an HTTP Basic Auth Authorization header value from username and password Returns: The header value: 'Basic <base64(user:pass)>'
function.name: web_basic_auth

function.description: Turn any string into a URL-safe slug (ASCII, lowercase, hyphen-separated) Returns: The slug, single line
function.name: web_slugify

function.description: Validate a crontab expression and list its next run times (UTC) Returns: Object with expression, normalized (6-field form), valid, and next (array of RFC 3339 UTC timestamps)
function.name: development_cron

count.description: Number of upcoming occurrences to list (default: 5)

expression.description: Cron expression, 5-field classic or 6/7-field with seconds/years

function.description: Generate UUIDs (v4 random, v7 time-ordered, nil) Returns: One UUID per line, lowercase hyphenated
function.name: development_uuid

count.description: Number of UUIDs to generate (one per line) (default: 1)

function.description: Test a regular expression against text; reports all matches with positions and named groups Returns: Object with pattern, is_match, match_count and matches (each with match, start, end byte offsets, and groups keyed by name or index)
function.name: development_regex

input.description: Text to test (reads stdin if omitted)

function.description: Unified diff between two texts, or two files with --files Returns: Unified diff (--- old / +++ new hunks); empty when inputs are equal
function.name: development_diff

files.description: Treat the two arguments as file paths

new.description: New text, or a file path with --files

old.description: Old text, or a file path with --files
